Name: Shizuku
Purpose: ADB-bootstrapped privilege bridge that unlocks higher-power local tools without full root.
SourceHint: Import a local Shizuku APK and install it with phone-apk-install.

Name: App Manager
Purpose: Package inspection, component review, backup, and app management helper.
SourceHint: Import a local App Manager APK and install it with phone-apk-install.

Name: Hail
Purpose: Freeze / hide apps through Shizuku-backed workflows.
SourceHint: Import a local Hail APK and install it with phone-apk-install.

Name: ShizuWall
Purpose: Shizuku-oriented firewall and app network control helper.
SourceHint: Import a local ShizuWall APK and install it with phone-apk-install.

Name: Termux
Purpose: On-device shell and automation environment that pairs well with exported bootstrap scripts.
SourceHint: Import a local Termux APK and install it with phone-apk-install.
